title: Temporary Suspension of the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas’ (BSP) Foreign Loans and Investments Management System (FLIMS) – Investment Module (IM)
text:
OFFICE OF THE DEPUTY GOVERNOR | MONETARY AND ECONOMICS SECTOR
CIRCULAR LETTER NO. CL-2026-___
To : All Authorized Agent Banks (AABs)/Subsidiary/Affiliate
Foreign Exchange Corporations of AABs (AAB Forex Corps)
and All Concerned
Subject : Temporary Suspension of the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas’
(BSP) Foreign Loans and Investments Management
System (FLIMS) – Investment Module (IM)
Effective immediately, the submission of applications for registration
of inward investments1 under Section 36.1 of the Manual of Regulations on
Foreign Exchange Transactions (FX Manual), as amended, through the
FLIMS-IM2 shall be temporarily suspended until further notice. This is to
allow the conduct of necessary system updates and enhancements to
further improve the system’s reliability and performance.
The temporary suspension of the FLIMS-IM shall also cover related
procedures made therein, including the account creation in the
International Operations Department (IOD) Portal through the BSP
Relationship Management System (BRMS).
All new applications shall be electronically submitted and processed
via email correspondence to iod_investments@bsp.gov.ph. Applications
submitted through FLIMS‑IM prior to the effectivity of this Circular Letter
shall continue to be processed through the aforementioned email address.
Queries or clarifications on the status of applications filed through
FLIMS-IM can be addressed to the BSP-IOD via the aforementioned email
address or through telephone number (+632) 8708-7684.
For guidance and implementation.
ZENO RONALD R. ABENOJA
Deputy Governor
_1_2_ March 2026
1 Including related requests (e.g., replacement of lost Bangko Sentral Registration
Documents) and requirements (e.g., notice for changes in BSP-registered
investments)
2 As provided under Circular Letter Nos. CL-2025-047 and CL-2025-048 both dated
01 December 2025
Classification: GENERAL Page
